pointtool.add:
Add points anywhere. 
Please touch the place you want to add.
pointtool.add_location:
Add a point to your current location. 
Turn on GPS and touch the screen.

home_btn.gps:
Turn on GPS. 
Press it again to switch off GPS, follow your current location, and jump.

layers_btn.import: Import GeoJSON, GPX, KML, KMZ files.

tutrials.termsOfUse: Do you agree to the terms of use and start?

maps_btn.online:
Switch to offline mode. 
Maps are loaded from cache.
maps_btn.offline:
Switch to online mode. 
Maps are loaded from the net.

tutrials.selectiontool:
Drag to select features. 
Selected features can be edited with tools.
tutrials.infotool:
Display feature information. 
Please touch the feature.

linetool.plot:
Create a line in your plot. 
A node is added where you touched. 
Touch the start point to finish editing the line. 
Touch the line to resume editing.

polygontool.plot:
Create a polygon in your plot. 
A node is added where you touched. 
Touch the start point to finish editing the polygon. 
Touch the polygon to resume editing.

tutrials.pencilmode: Use a pen to draw. A finger touch will move.

The password used for encryption. 
You will need it to log in with another device. 
You will also need it when you reinstall the app.

dataConflict.title: Updated on Another Device
dataConflict.message:
This data has been updated on another device. What would you like to do?

Merge: Keep changes from both
Overwrite: Overwrite with this device's data (changes from the other device will be lost)

storageMigration.title: Previous Data Found
storageMigration.description: The app's storage system has been updated. You can export your previous data to use with the new system.
storageMigration.infoText: After exporting, you can import the saved file by selecting 'Import' from the 'Data' tab in Settings.
storageMigration.exportCompleteMessage:
Your previous data has been exported.

You can import the saved file by selecting 'Import' from the 'Data' tab in Settings.
storageMigration.skipConfirmMessage:
Do you want to skip the previous data and start as new?

Note: You may not be able to restore the previous data.
storageMigration.postponeMessage: You will be asked again next time you launch the app.

GoogleDriveProjects.description: A personal storage feature that works with your Google account. Save the current data to your Google Drive and load previously saved data.

confirm.saveInRunningProject: A shared project is running. This backup is saved to your personal Google Drive and will not be shared with the team. Continue?
confirm.overwrite: A project with the same name exists on Drive. Overwrite it? (Previous versions can be restored from Drive revision history.)
confirm.load: Load this project? The current data and settings will be overwritten.
confirm.delete: Delete this project? (It will be moved to the Drive trash.)

GpsSettings.note: The setting takes effect the next time GPS starts.

high.title: High accuracy
high.description: Uses the most accurate location. Consumes more battery.

medium.title: Balanced
medium.description: Balances location accuracy and battery consumption.

low.title: Battery saver
low.description: Reduces battery consumption. Location accuracy is lower.
